slot.revelation.name: Revelation
slot.revelation.empty: Revelations found during exploration appear here. You may gain one at the start of each Act.
slot.aberration.name: Aberration
slot.aberration.empty: Aberrations found during exploration appear here. You may gain one after losing enough HP in combat.
slot.swarmcall.name: Echo
slot.swarmcall.empty: Echoes found during exploration appear here. You may gain one at the start of each Act.
effect.ursus_roar.name: Roar of Ursus
effect.ursus_roar.desc: At the start of each combat, apply 2 Weak to ALL enemies.
effect.yan_erosion.name: Vicissitudes of Yan
effect.columbia_innovation.name: Columbian Ingenuity
effect.columbia_innovation.desc: After your next combat, gain 1 additional Rare card reward.
effect.sami_fortitude.name: Fortitude of Sami
effect.victoria_glory.name: Glory of Victoria
effect.victoria_glory.desc: Whenever you take damage, there is a 25% chance to prevent it.
effect.leithanien_elegance.name: Leithanien Elegance
effect.leithanien_elegance.desc: At the start of each combat, gain 8 Plating.
effect.sargon_generosity.name: Generosity of Sargon
effect.hematopoietic_disorder.name: Hematopoietic Disorder
effect.hematopoietic_disorder.desc: While below 80% HP, lose 1 HP at the end of each turn.
effect.focus_disorder.name: Focus Disorder
effect.focus_disorder.desc: Vakuu takes control of the first turn of each combat.
effect.neurodegeneration.name: Neurodegeneration
effect.neurodegeneration.desc: During the first turn of each combat, you can only play 1 card.
effect.flesh_distortion.name: Flesh Distortion
effect.flesh_distortion.desc: When obtained, lose 50% Max HP. When removed, restore the same amount of Max HP.
effect.echo_strife.name: Echo: Strife
effect.echo_strife.desc: During this Act, ALL units gain 1 Strength at the start of each turn.
effect.echo_modification.name: Echo: Modification
effect.echo_modification.desc: During this Act, gain 25 Gold whenever you enter a non-combat room. Lose the Gold gained this way when you leave the Act.
effect.echo_wither.name: Echo: Bloom and Wither
effect.echo_wither.desc: Combat Gold rewards are doubled. Lose 2 HP whenever you enter a combat room.
effect.echo_supply.name: Echo: Provisions
effect.echo_supply.desc: After combat, there is a 30% chance to gain an additional card reward. At the start of each combat, ALL enemies gain 4 Plating.
effect.echo_long_road.name: Echo: The Long Road
effect.echo_long_road.desc: During this Act, gain 3 Max HP after each combat, but take 50% more damage.
effect.echo_allme.name: Echo: Collective Self
effect.echo_allme.desc: During each combat in this Act, deal 10 damage to ALL enemies for every 5 cards you play, and gain 1 Energy for every 10 cards you play.
